pattern: absolute-positioned child in flex container without position:relative on parent
detection_question: Does any flex container have a position:absolute child without position:relative on the flex parent?
checklist_item: When mixing display:flex with position:absolute children, verify position:relative on the flex parent

pattern: policy readers assume scalar coverage values and crash on dict-shaped payloads
detection_question: Do governance readers normalize both scalar and object forms for coverage/metrics fields before numeric coercion?
checklist_item: Normalize telemetry field shapes before scoring or threshold comparisons

pattern: automation creates duplicate epics when policy blocks are evaluated without reuse lookup
detection_question: When epic creation is blocked by policy, does workflow deterministically reuse an existing open epic/task instead of creating new items?
checklist_item: Implement idempotent open-item reuse before create operations in backlog automation
